query:
SELECT 
  DATE(subscribedAt) as giorno,
  COUNT(*) as nuovi,
  SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE(subscribedAt)) as cumulativo
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active'
GROUP BY DATE(subscribedAt)
ORDER BY giorno DESC
LIMIT 15;
